strengths: Proven hands-on experience with AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling (e.g., MCP code generators at re:cinq)
Strong distributed-systems background with expertise in event-driven architectures and real-time data processing (e.g., GISCollective, Dunnhumby media)
Demonstrated leadership in scaling engineering teams and implementing disciplined development practices (e.g., TDD, CI/CD at RIDE Capital)
concerns: Limited direct fintech infrastructure experience (e.g., credit risk, payment flows, or embedded finance)
Minimal evidence of operating AI systems in highly regulated or high-stakes commercial environments
Short tenure at recent roles (e.g., 6 months at re:cinq, career gap) raises questions about long-term commitment or stability
response.justification: Bogdan demonstrates strong technical depth in agentic AI infrastructure and distributed systems, with hands-on contributions to real-time data processing and scalable architectures. However, his lack of direct fintech experience and regulatory compliance background, combined with short tenures in recent roles, may pose risks for this executive leadership position. His leadership in engineering practices is a strength but requires validation in a fintech-specific context.
